step_rationale: Autoimmune trigger of thrombophilia and procoagulant phospholipid exposure.
mechanism: Anti-β2-glycoprotein I antibodies promote a prothrombotic state through phospholipid-dependent coagulation activation.

references.title: Multidomain Biomarkers as Predictors of Cardiovascular Risk in Acute Coronary Syndrome: A Prospective Evaluation.
